changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS findings; CREATE TABLE findings ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, technology_category_id integer DEFAULT NULL, control_subcategory_id integer DEFAULT NULL, name character varying (255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', percentage float DEFAULT NULL, value float DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_findings PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_findings_to_control_subcategory FOREIGN KEY (control_subcategory_id) REFERENCES control_subcategories (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_findings_to_technology_category FOREIGN KEY (technology_category_id) REFERENCES technology_categories (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_findings_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_findings_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_findings_technology_category ON findings (technology_category_id); CREATE INDEX i_findings_control_subcategory ON findings (control_subcategory_id); CREATE INDEX i_findings_organization_name ON findings (organization_id, name); CREATE INDEX ui_findings_organization_control_subcategory ON findings (organization_id, control_subcategory_id);
